programme.title: Kyun Utthe Dil Chhod Aaye
programme.desc: In 1947, people were at the cusp of their independence brimming with new freedom, new dreams, new hopes and an excitement of building a new tomorrow.

programme.title: Ishk Par Zor Nahi
programme.desc: A new-age young love story of two opposite personalities with conflicting views on love and life, meet and start to falling in love.

programme.title: Punyashlok Ahilyabai
programme.desc: Set in the backdrop of 18th century Maharashtra, a common girl, Ahilyabai Holkar, who with the support of her father-in-law Malhar Rao Holkar, confronts the pre-defined norms of the patriarchal society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: When Shirdi Sai Baba steps in, miracles happen. Follow his teachings of faith and patience in this devotional show.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
programme.desc: Despite being Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's son, Lord Ganesha has not had it all easy. However, nothing ever stops the remover of obstacles from fighting evil and alleviating the sufferings of those in need.

programme.title: Ishk Par Zor Nahi
programme.desc: A new-age young love story of two opposite personalities with conflicting views on love and life, meet and start to falling in love.

programme.title: Punyashlok Ahilyabai
programme.desc: Set in the backdrop of 18th century Maharashtra, a common girl, Ahilyabai Holkar, who with the support of her father-in-law Malhar Rao Holkar, confronts the pre-defined norms of the patriarchal society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: When Shirdi Sai Baba steps in, miracles happen. Follow his teachings of faith and patience in this devotional show.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
programme.desc: Despite being Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's son, Lord Ganesha has not had it all easy. However, nothing ever stops the remover of obstacles from fighting evil and alleviating the sufferings of those in need.

programme.title: Kyun Utthe Dil Chhod Aaye
programme.desc: In 1947, people were at the cusp of their independence brimming with new freedom, new dreams, new hopes and an excitement of building a new tomorrow.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Join Mumbai's police force in action as they deal with the criminal activities around the city in this dramatisation of true cases of crime handled by Indian police.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: The king of stand-up comedy, Kapil Sharma, is back to entertain viewers in this Indian Hindi talk show.

programme.title: Kuch Rang Pyar Ke Aise Bhi
programme.desc: A look at the modern intricacies of romantic relationships.

programme.title: Zindagi Ke Crossroads
programme.desc: Ram Kapoor presents an emotional roller coaster discussion where the audience is asked to discuss how the decisions we make affect and shape our lives.

programme.desc: Join Mumbai's police force in action as they deal with the criminal activities around the city in this dramatisation of true cases of crime handled by Indian police.

programme.title: Story 9 months ki
programme.desc: Alia, an independent young woman, decides to become a single mother through IVF. While looking for a suitable donor, she meets Sarangdhar, an aspiring writer.

programme.title: Kyun Utthe Dil Chhod Aaye
programme.desc: In 1947, people were at the cusp of their independence brimming with new freedom, new dreams, new hopes and an excitement of building a new tomorrow.

programme.title: Ishk Par Zor Nahi
programme.desc: A new-age young love story of two opposite personalities with conflicting views on love and life, meet and start to falling in love.

programme.title: Punyashlok Ahilyabai
programme.desc: Set in the backdrop of 18th century Maharashtra, a common girl, Ahilyabai Holkar, who with the support of her father-in-law Malhar Rao Holkar, confronts the pre-defined norms of the patriarchal society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: When Shirdi Sai Baba steps in, miracles happen. Follow his teachings of faith and patience in this devotional show.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
programme.desc: Despite being Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's son, Lord Ganesha has not had it all easy. However, nothing ever stops the remover of obstacles from fighting evil and alleviating the sufferings of those in need.

programme.title: Kyun Utthe Dil Chhod Aaye
programme.desc: In 1947, people were at the cusp of their independence brimming with new freedom, new dreams, new hopes and an excitement of building a new tomorrow.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Join Mumbai's police force in action as they deal with the criminal activities around the city in this dramatisation of true cases of crime handled by Indian police.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: The king of stand-up comedy, Kapil Sharma, is back to entertain viewers in this Indian Hindi talk show.

programme.title: Kuch Rang Pyar Ke Aise Bhi
programme.desc: A look at the modern intricacies of romantic relationships.

programme.title: Zindagi Ke Crossroads
programme.desc: Ram Kapoor presents an emotional roller coaster discussion where the audience is asked to discuss how the decisions we make affect and shape our lives.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Join Mumbai's police force in action as they deal with the criminal activities around the city in this dramatisation of true cases of crime handled by Indian police.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Join Mumbai's police force in action as they deal with the criminal activities around the city in this dramatisation of true cases of crime handled by Indian police.

programme.title: Indian Idol 2020
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.desc: In 1947, people were at the cusp of their independence brimming with new freedom, new dreams, new hopes and an excitement of building a new tomorrow.

programme.desc: A look at the modern intricacies of romantic relationships.

programme.title: Super Dancer - Chapter 4
programme.desc: We're back as more contestants battle it out with more electrifying moves.

programme.title: Super Dancer
programme.desc: A group of children, aged between four and 13, compete to find out who is the future of dance. They are tested on their desire to dance, their determination and their discipline.
